samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning four cases (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Nazi Germany) under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. American Revolution and Napoleon case mapping to PPW cases is pending confirmation (PPW #149-#151). Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: caseIds lists only the two PPW cases that currently exist (american-civil-war-union, nazi-germany). American Revolution and Napoleon cases are not yet registered in PPW; they will be added once case mapping is confirmed (PPW #149-#151). No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #138. Corpus import scheduled for Milestone 17. Claim promotion is separate from corpus availability and requires PPW review gates.
